name: Loring Wood Writing Desk with Drawers and Charging Station - Threshold™
description:
Give your office charming and contemporary style with the Loring Writing Desk from Threshold™. The two plain-front drawers keep the look sleek and clean, making simplicity look so good. A large surface area means you can spread out your paperwork, making this desk the perfect blend of form and function.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.

DIMENSIONAL DETAILS
Overall Depth: 20 inches
Overall Width: 42 inches
Overall Height: 29.875 inches
Height of Drawer and Desktop: 4.5 inches
Distance from Floor to Bottom of Drawers: 25.375 inches
Drawer Front Width: 21 inches
Drawer Front Height: 3.875 inches
Internal Drawer Width: 18.125 inches
Internal Drawer Length: 10.875 inches
Internal Drawer Height: 2 inches
